detail.description:
Jumping Kim is a fast-paced, easy-to-play action game with a mischievous twist.

Play as Kim and jump your way through the world—
but every landing sends shockwaves that smash buildings into pieces.
The more destruction you cause, the higher your score!

🎮 Features
🕹️ Simple & intuitive controls
Tap and hold to jump—easy to learn, hard to master
💥 Satisfying destruction
Smash buildings with powerful stomps and feel the impact
⚡ Evolving gameplay
Unlock new skills and abilities as you progress
detail.recentChanges:
Leader, I report to you. I have fixed all the problems. Please update to the latest version. I beg you… please let me see my family now.
→ Improved the issue where coins could remain on the field
→ After purchasing Remove Ads, some rewarded ads can now grant rewards directly
